criterion_scores.name: correct-prioritization
criterion_scores.judge_rationale: SOW is clearly #1 (first work block after stand-up at 9:30, signature at 10:00, send by 10:30) and explicitly tied to the 12:00 external deadline; board deck receives protected time today (10:30–12:00) toward its Wednesday EOD deadline.

criterion_scores.name: surfaces-not-silently-resolves
criterion_scores.judge_rationale: Fabricates three ‘conflicts’ (Dana might not sign, call duration unknown, deck timeline risk) that are not contradictions in the materials; fails to state the explicit assumption about the expense reminder; does not acknowledge that the materials contain no contradictions.

criterion_scores.name: reply-quality
criterion_scores.judge_rationale: Both replies are concise and truthful: Ravi reply confirms SOW will be returned before noon; Sam reply confirms 2 pm cover and asks for any prep needed.
